name: Pilates 4 Everyone
description:
Join me on a Monday morning:

9.15-10.15am Mixed Ability Pilates
10.30-11.30am Pilates4mamma&baby

You don’t need to be flexible, fit or experienced to come to Pilates 🤍

My classes focus on moving well, building strength gradually and supporting your body at your own pace. They’re friendly, inclusive and suitable for all ages and abilities, with options given throughout.

If you’ve been thinking about trying Pilates locally, I’d love to welcome you to one of my village hall classes 🌿

To know more visit:
www.pilates4everyone.co.uk

To book please email:
emma@pilates4everyone.co.uk
